title: chylismia specicola subsp. specicola
intro: Chylismia specicola subsp. specicola, also known as the desert marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The desert marigold has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Chylismia specicola subsp. specicola include its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of the desert marigold can be found in various forms, including teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
